service_account_id.description: The fully-qualified name of the service account to apply policy to.

role.description: The role that should be applied. Only one google_service_account_iam_binding can be used per role. Note that custom roles must be of the format [projects|organizations]/{parent-name}/roles/{role-name}.

members.description: An array of identities that will be granted the privilege in the role. Valid values: allUsers, AllAuthenticatedUsers, user:{emailid}, serviceAccount:{emailid}, group:{emailid}, domain:{domain}
